title: Understand: matter and energy in food webs
description: Check your understanding of matter and energy in food webs in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.
topic_path: Understand: matter and energy in food webs

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these best describes how matter moves in an ecosystem?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Matter cycles between living and nonliving parts of an ecosystem.
Matter moves through an ecosystem, eventually leaving as heat.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these best describes how energy moves in an ecosystem?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Energy moves through an ecosystem, eventually leaving as heat.
Energy cycles between living and nonliving parts of an ecosystem.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best word to fill in the blank.**

> \_\_\_\_\_\_ moves through an ecosystem, eventually leaving as heat.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**How do producers get the matter and energy they need to live?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: They make their own food inside their cells.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How do consumers get the matter and energy they need to live?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: They make their own food inside their cells.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How do decomposers get the matter and energy they need to live?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: They make their own food inside their cells.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these terms describes an organism that eats a producer?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which of these terms describes an organism that eats a primary consumer?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best term to fill in the blank.**

>An organism that eats producers is called a \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]

In a food web, an arrow points from a triggerfish to a flounder.

**Which of these is true about the organisms described above?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Flounders and triggerfish eat each other.

assessment_items.question_content:
In a food web, an arrow points from a rockfish to a kelp bass.

**Which of these is true about the organisms described above?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Kelp bass and rockfish eat each other.

assessment_items.question_content:
In a food web, an arrow points from a kit fox to a coyote.

**Which of these is true about the organisms described above?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Coyotes and kit foxes eat each other.
